profileMemory.content: Ada gets the most value from operator-heavy intros tied to real pilots.
Most recent event debrief: met Kwame Boateng, Maya Okafor; usefulness 5/5. Kwame is a strong pilot partner and Maya has community design overlap.
Claimed profile with goals: find pilot partners, meet operators; looking for: community builders, design partners.
Claimed profile with goals: find strong founders, understand climate adjacency; looking for: fundable teams, repeat founders.
